title: My Ninja Way
body:
There are no wrong ways to live a life.
Create what you love.
Follow your gut.
Search for others that do the same.

title: Trying new things
body:
First you’ll hate it.
Then you’ll tolerate it.
Then you’ll love it.

title: People
body:
Treat them all as if they're your friends.
Always mess around and have fun with them.

title: Weakness
body:
It's not weakness when you don't know everything.
It's not weakness when you need someone to help you.

The greatest people in the world ask for help everyday.
What makes them great is that they appreciate those who decide to help.
